query_normalized: llmxive follow-up: extending "learning from the self-future: on-policy self-distillation for dllms" linguistics
rationale: This paper directly addresses the user's question by proposing "dOPSD," an extension of the "Learning from the Self-future" (OPSD) framework specifically for Diffusion Language Models (dLLMs), which satisfies the "same-mechanism evidence" (a) and "foundational methodology" (d) criteria for the user's follow-up research.
